chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. S- 506 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.01.2016 1. For Orders on Office Objection 2. For Katcha Peshi Mr. Mazhar Ali Leghari, Advocate for Petitioners Mr. Ashfaq Nabi Qazi Asstt: A.G. Case of the petitioners is that they are being harassed by the respondents on account of their marriages. Learned A.A.G. has filed comments of respondent No.3 and states that against the petitioner an FIR bearing Crime No. 91 of 2015 at police station Kashmore has been registered. Regarding any alleged harassment he stated that no harassment would be caused to the petitioners and official respondents would act strictly in accordance with law. That statement has satisfied the counsel for petitioner and he seeks disposal of this petition in the above terms. This petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE *Karar/-
